mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_session (title, type, category, trainer_id, trainer_name, class_date, start_time, end_time, capacity, enrolled, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{type}, #{category}, #{trainerId}, #{trainerName}, #{classDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{capacity}, 0, 'OPEN')
mapper.update: UPDATE class_session SET status='CANCELLED' WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE class_session SET enrolled=enrolled+1 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM class_attendee WHERE class_session_id=#{classId} AND member_id=#{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE class_session SET enrolled=GREATEST(enrolled-1, 0) WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ca.id, ca.class_session_id, ca.member_id, m.name AS member_name, m.phone, m.gender, ca.registered_at, ca.attended FROM class_attendee ca JOIN member m ON ca.member_id=m.id WHERE ca.class_session_id=#{classId} ORDER BY ca.registered_at ASC
